meaning: adj.潦草的,凌乱的,刺痛的,发痒的,凑合的,发刮擦声的
examples: Wool is so scratchy that it irritates the skin.
Listening to the scratchy recording, I recognized Walt Whitman immediately.
You will probably experience the symptoms of sneezing, itchy and watery eyes, stuffy or runny noses and scratchy throats.
In the distance a tractor rumbled, and scratchy music wafted from speakers at a nearby Buddhist festival.
And scratchy blackout curtains shut out light from sash windows once framed by shimmering amber satin.
